title: Opendoor Announces Second Quarter of 2025 Financial Results
text: Opendoor delivered $1.6 billion in revenue in the second quarter of 2025 and achieved its first quarter of Adjusted EBITDA profitability since 2022, even as housing market conditions continued to deteriorate. Adjusted EBITDA was $23 million, versus $(5) million in Q2 2024 and $(30) million in Q1 2025. Adjusted EBITDA Margin was 1.5%, versus (0.3)% in Q2 2024 and (2.6)% in Q1 2025. Adjusted Net Loss was $(9) million, versus $(31) million in Q2 2024 and $(63) million in Q1 2025. The company had 4,299 total homes sold in Q2 2025, up 5% versus Q2 2024. This milestone represents a significant turning point for Opendoor as it moves toward profitability under new leadership and its Opendoor 2.0 strategy focused on software, AI, and marketplace capabilities. The company continues to focus on improving unit economics, reducing aged inventory, and expanding its AI integration across operations.
